2026-07-15-fred-design.md | 270 ++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++++--------
 1 file changed, 224 insertions(+), 46 deletions(-)
acceptance numbering ok: 37

#### 7.2.1 Metadata Columns

FRED borrows the useful shape of Oil's column registry and column specifications, while keeping its own flat path-list model. The reference implementation is Oil's [`columns.lua`](https://github.com/stevearc/oil.nvim/blob/b73018b75affd13fa38e2fc94ef753b465f770d7/lua/oil/columns.lua) and [`oil-columns` documentation](https://github.com/stevearc/oil.nvim/blob/b73018b75affd13fa38e2fc94ef753b465f770d7/doc/oil.txt#L412-L494). FRED does not copy Oil runtime code or depend on Oil.

The editable buffer line remains exactly one encoded root-relative path. Columns are rendered as Neovim extmark virtual text at byte column zero with `virt_text_pos = "inline"`; they are not inserted into the buffer line, are not parsed by the planner, and cannot be mistaken for a path component. The path is always the final visible field. EntryId remains an extmark and is never rendered as editable text.

The initial built-in columns are:

- `icon`: a stable icon for file, directory, symlink, and other entry kinds; the built-in provider has kind fallbacks and accepts configured icon strings;
- `permissions`: a platform permission string such as `rwxr-xr-x`; unavailable permissions render `-` and never fail a scan;
- `size`: the entry's byte size, formatted compactly; directory size is not recursively calculated and renders `-` unless directly available;
- `mtime`: last modification time;
- `ctime`: change/status time where the platform exposes it;
- `atime`: last access time where the platform exposes it;
- `birthtime`: creation time where the platform exposes it;
- `type`: the normalized entry kind, useful for display or sorting.

`mtime` is the default timestamp column. `ctime`, `atime`, and `birthtime` are opt-in because their meaning and availability differ across platforms. Version one columns are read-only metadata. In particular, the permissions column does not turn a virtual text edit into `chmod`; a future explicit action may add that behavior without changing buffer path syntax.

Column specifications follow the Oil-like string-or-table shape:

```lua
columns = {
  "icon",
  "permissions",
  { "size", align = "right" },
  { "mtime", format = "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M", width = 16 },
}
```

With that configuration, the screen may look like this; actual glyphs depend on the configured icon strings:

```text
  rwxr-xr-x       384  2026-07-16 10:22  .git/
  rw-r--r--     81.5k  2026-07-16 10:22  2026-07-15-fred-design.md
```

The actual buffer text remains:

```text
.git/
2026-07-15-fred-design.md
```

FRED displays neither Oil's concealed `/NNN` internal-ID prefix nor a `../` parent row. EntryId stays in an extmark, and the View root is intentionally not represented by a row.

A string selects defaults. A table uses the first element as the column name and may set `width`, `align` (`"left"`, `"center"`, or `"right"`), `format` for time columns, `highlight`, `separator`, and column-specific icon options. The path column is implicit and cannot be removed.

The default separator is one display cell. Default minimum display widths are two cells for `icon`, nine for `permissions`, eight for `size`, nine for `type`, and the formatted display width for each timestamp. Missing values use `-` and the same padding/alignment as present values. `width` is a minimum measured with Neovim display width, not byte length; a wider value expands that column for the whole projection rather than being truncated. All rows in one projection therefore use the same stable boundaries. This follows Oil's projection-wide width/alignment pass in [`view.lua`](https://github.com/stevearc/oil.nvim/blob/b73018b75affd13fa38e2fc94ef753b465f770d7/lua/oil/view.lua#L650-L818), adapted to virtual text rather than editable prefix text.

The internal Rust definition is intentionally small:

```text
ColumnDefinition {
  name
  required_metadata
  default_width
  default_alignment
  render(entry, metadata, column_options) -> highlighted text chunks
  sort_value(entry, metadata) -> optional scalar
}
```

Version one registers only built-in columns; it does not expose a public custom-column or backend registration API. Unlike Oil, FRED column definitions do not parse mutable column text because only the path exists in the buffer syntax.

Each column definition declares the metadata it needs. `icon` and `type` use already-known entry kind; `permissions`, `size`, and time columns request stat metadata. A scan requests the union of metadata fields required by all attached Views of a RootSession, just as coverage is the union of their directory scopes. This follows Oil's on-demand `require_stat` approach in [`files.lua`](https://github.com/stevearc/oil.nvim/blob/b73018b75affd13fa38e2fc94ef753b465f770d7/lua/oil/adapters/files.lua#L50-L225). Metadata failures render a placeholder and a non-blocking status rather than making a namespace scan authoritative or failed. Refreshing metadata may re-render clean and dirty Views, but changes to permissions, size, or timestamps never create FRED namespace conflicts.

Changing columns only reprojects the View and requests any missing metadata. It never changes buffer lines, dirty state, edit-base revisions, or filesystem intent. Sorting may use `path`, `type`, `size`, `mtime`, `ctime`, `atime`, or `birthtime`; unavailable metadata sorts after available values and does not block apply.

A metadata revision may re-sort a clean View. A dirty View updates virtual columns only and freezes its real buffer-line order; metadata-driven re-sorting is recorded as pending until the View becomes clean after apply, discard, successful empty-plan synchronization, or re-root. Changing a sort key while dirty follows the same rule. This prevents metadata refresh from changing buffer text, changedtick, extmark movement, or undo history.

### 7.3 Commands And Mappings

Default commands:

```text
:Fred [root]                 open a View
:FredApply                   plan, preview, confirm, and execute
:FredRefresh                 force filesystem reconciliation
:FredDepth {n|all}           change baseline recursion depth
:FredExpand [depth]          locally expand the current directory
:FredCollapse                locally collapse the current directory
:FredFilter {pattern}        set a temporary projection filter
:FredFilter!                 clear the temporary filter
:FredPasteInto               paste a FRED-aware yank into the current directory
:FredNew {file|dir}          insert an explicitly typed pending entry
:FredLink {from} {to}        immediately create a symlink outside the planner
```

Suggested default mappings:

```text
<CR>       open a file; re-root on a directory
-          open the parent root after resolving dirty state
gp         paste a FRED-aware yank into the current directory
zo         expand the current directory one level
zc         collapse the current directory
zO         recursively materialize the current directory
zC         recursively collapse the current directory
R          force refresh

[1176 more lines in file. Use offset=426 to continue.]

### 10.1 Immutable Snapshots

A published filesystem snapshot is immutable and carries a monotonically increasing revision. A scan generation builds one candidate snapshot plus provisional rendering batches without mutating `current_snapshot`.

Provisional batches and individual scopes may render as they arrive, but a generation publishes exactly one new immutable `current_snapshot` only after every requested scope reaches a terminal complete, partial, or failed result. Partial and failed scopes remain explicitly non-authoritative inside that single published result. Late or cancelled generations cannot publish, and provisional data never updates a View's edit base.

Published snapshots remain alive while referenced by dirty Views and are released when no View needs them. Namespace snapshots contain identity, path, kind, coverage authority, and scan status; optional permission, size, and timestamp observations live in a separate RootSession metadata cache with its own monotonically increasing `metadata_revision`. Metadata enrichment or eviction may re-render columns without advancing `root_revision` or any View edit base.

Cleanup policy may evict only snapshots and metadata that are not referenced by the current RootSession, an attached View's edit base, pending intent or diagnostics, an active scan/apply task, or watcher coverage.

### 10.2 RootSession

All Views of the same canonical root share one Rust RootSession:

```text
RootSession {
  canonical_root
  current_snapshot: Arc<Snapshot>
  root_revision
  scan_cache
  metadata_cache
  metadata_revision
  scan_generation
  metadata_generation
  cache_usage: { estimated_bytes, cached_entry_count }
  cleanup_lru
  directory_status
  watcher_state
  coverage_reference_counts
  metadata_reference_counts
  task_state: Idle | Scan | Apply
}
```

The RootSession does not own a mutation lock. The mutation lock is process-global because different canonical roots can overlap.

### 10.3 View

Each FRED buffer owns independent View state:

```text
View {
  view_id
  bufnr
  view_generation
  baseline_depth
  local_expansions
  filter
  sort
  sort_pending
  columns
  column_layout
  projection
  intent
  intent_generation
  dirty_state
  edit_base: Arc<Snapshot>
  cursor_identity
  last_changedtick
}
```

A clean View may advance its edit base whenever a new snapshot is published. A dirty View keeps the immutable snapshot against which its current intent was captured.

Two Views over the same root may use different depth, expansion, filter, sort, and column settings and may both contain edits.

### 10.4 Revision And Rebase Behavior

When a new snapshot is published:

- clean Views reproject from it;
- dirty Views compare their immutable edit base, the new snapshot, and their desired namespace;
- non-overlapping namespace changes merge automatically;
- conflicting paths, kinds, identities, or destinations remain visible and block the affected plan;
- the dirty View advances its edit base only after a successful rebase.

File contents, permissions, size, and timestamps are not part of this conflict model.

### 10.5 View Lifecycle

The runtime owns the authoritative registry keyed by opaque `view_id`, with validated secondary lookup by `bufnr`.

Buffer wipeout, re-root, and explicit close invalidate the old View generation, release coverage references, and detach it from its RootSession. Asynchronous events carry root, View, and generation identity rather than trusting a reusable buffer number.

### 10.6 Overlapping RootSessions

After any successful or partially successful mutation, the runtime invalidates scan generations and schedules refresh for every attached RootSession whose root overlaps an affected path. This keeps parent-root and child-root Views consistent even though they do not share one RootSession.

## 11. Identity And Provenance

Every rendered existing row has an extmark carrying its opaque RootSession-scoped `EntryId`. Marks and statuses bind to EntryId, not line number.

Identity rules:

- editing text preserves identity while the extmark remains associated with that row;
- moving text preserves identity only when Neovim actually moves the extmark with it;
- yank and put never copy an extmark;
- a provenance-linked put receives a new pending identity with `copy_from = EntryId`;
- source removal plus one destination may normalize that destination to MOVE;
- two existing rows cannot carry the same identity;
- if an extmark is lost, FRED may rebind only through a unique, unconsumed, unchanged base path;
- ambiguous lost identity is never guessed;
- external rename is represented conservatively as deletion of the old path and creation of the new path.

Hard links are separate namespace entries and receive separate EntryIds even when the operating system reports shared underlying storage.

## 12. Scanner, Coverage, And Watchers

### 12.1 Scanner Events And Atomic Publication

The scanner is a cancellable Rust worker task. A request includes:

```text
root
required directory scopes
baseline depth
local expansion overrides
ignore matcher
required metadata fields from configured columns and sort keys
max_entries
max_directories
generation
```

The worker emits bounded events such as:

```text
ScanBatch
MetadataBatch
ScanProgress
DirectoryComplete
DirectoryFailed
ScanComplete
ScanCancelled
```

Requirements:

- emit at most `render_batch_size` entries per batch;
- attach `scan_generation` to namespace events and `metadata_generation` plus `source_root_revision` to metadata events;
- increment `metadata_generation` whenever required metadata fields change, a metadata request is cancelled, or a new namespace snapshot publishes;
- accept a MetadataBatch only when its metadata generation is current, its source root revision still equals `root_revision`, every field remains required, and EntryId plus encoded path still match the current snapshot;
- discard events from obsolete scan or metadata generations;
- attach metadata observations to EntryId plus the observed encoded path so a late value cannot bind to a moved or replaced entry;
- record each requested scope as complete, partial, or failed for that generation;
- never follow a directory symlink;
- stop at configured limits and report partial coverage;
- publish exactly one immutable snapshot only after every requested scope in the generation has reached a terminal result;
- retain partial and failed scopes as non-authoritative status inside the published generation result;
- keep Neovim calls on the main thread;
- fetch stat metadata only when a configured column or sort key requires it;
- allow metadata-only enrichment to use the bounded Scan worker/channel without publishing a namespace snapshot or advancing `root_revision`;
- publish accepted metadata batches by advancing only `metadata_revision` and re-rendering affected virtual columns;
- treat metadata collection failure as a per-entry placeholder, not as a namespace scan failure.

Default limits:

```lua
max_entries = 50000
max_directories = 10000
render_batch_size = 500
```

Reaching a limit or failing an unrelated directory produces a visible partial state; it does not globally disable apply.

### 12.2 Coverage Union

A RootSession scans and watches the union of directories required by attached Views.

Coverage includes:

- each View's baseline depth;
- local expansions;
- directories needed to display pinned intent, conflict, and validation-error rows;
- ancestor context needed by those rows.

Temporary filters do not reduce coverage because they alter projection only.

Coverage is reference-counted. When no attached View needs a directory, its watcher may be released and its cached state may cease to be authoritative. COPY_TREE and DELETE_TREE do not add descendant enumeration coverage.

Metadata requirements are also reference-counted as the union of attached View columns and sort keys. Removing a column may release its metadata requirement without reducing directory coverage. Optional metadata that no View requires becomes eligible for cleanup, while namespace entry identity, path, kind, and coverage authority remain intact.

### 12.3 Watcher Behavior

FRED automatically attempts to establish watchers for covered directories; version one has no watcher toggle. Established watchers monitor covered directories. Events are debounced and coalesced by affected directory, then trigger incremental scan requests.

FRED-generated mutations also produce watcher events. The executor reports affected paths so watcher events can be merged with explicit post-execution refresh.

If watcher coverage cannot be established, FRED displays a degraded warning and leaves manual refresh available. Missing watcher coverage alone does not prevent apply.

### 12.4 Cache Cleanup Policy

FRED has no persistent disk cache in version one. Cache cleanup governs Rust-owned scan entries, per-entry metadata, provisional scan batches, and obsolete snapshots retained by references. It never deletes or changes filesystem entries. Oil's hidden-buffer cleanup in [`view.lua`](https://github.com/stevearc/oil.nvim/blob/b73018b75affd13fa38e2fc94ef753b465f770d7/lua/oil/view.lua#L227-L241) is a useful lifecycle reference, but FRED cannot clear all state at once because RootSessions, watcher coverage, and dirty edit-base snapshots are shared.

`cached_entry_count` counts namespace rows retained by `scan_cache`; attached metadata records do not add another count, and provisional batches plus snapshots are not part of this count. `estimated_bytes` includes scan-cache rows, metadata records, provisional batches, and uniquely owned retained snapshots.

Cleanup has two layers:

1. Reference cleanup is mandatory. Cancelled or obsolete scan generations release provisional batches immediately. When a View is wiped out, re-rooted, or closed, its coverage references and edit-base reference are released. A directory cache entry with no coverage reference, watcher, active task, pinned diagnostic, pending intent, or snapshot reference may be dropped immediately.
2. Policy cleanup is opportunistic. A bounded sweeper removes the least-recently-used eligible entries when they exceed the configured idle age, memory estimate, or entry count. Old snapshots are eligible only when no attached View or RootSession state references them.

The public policy is:

```lua

## Review

- **Medium:** [`2026-07-15-fred-design.md:704`](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:704) states that cleanup may evict only snapshots and metadata, which excludes scan-cache rows and provisional batches. Later sections explicitly include those objects in cleanup at [line 888](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:888) and evict them at [line 914](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:914). The cleanup object scope therefore remains contradictory.

- **Medium:** The authoritative eviction algorithm at [line 914](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:914) uses class priority first, then LRU within metadata and scan-cache classes. The generic policy at [line 895](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:895), integration-test strategy at [line 1437](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1437), and performance requirement at [line 1520](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1520) instead read as global LRU-first eviction. They also do not explicitly record tests for the rule that metadata, snapshots, and provisional batches do not contribute to `max_cached_entries` at [line 890](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:890).

- **Medium:** The two metadata acceptance tokens are correctly specified as independent conjunctive checks at [lines 835-837](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:835), but the recorded tests do not independently prove `source_root_revision`. Snapshot publication increments `metadata_generation` as well, so the stale-publication cases at [line 1397](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1397) and [line 1439](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1439) would still pass if the source-revision check were absent. The strategy needs a current-generation/stale-source-revision case, paired with a stale-generation/current-source-revision case. Acceptance criterion 10 at [line 1552](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1552) currently mentions only stale generations.

- **Correct:** The visual/raw-buffer example and explicit absence of `/NNN` and `../` are closed at [lines 356-370](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:356), with integration coverage recorded at [line 1438](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1438).

- **Correct:** Dirty-View metadata sorting is deferred without changing real lines, `changedtick`, or undo state at [line 395](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:395), reinforced at [line 930](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:930), with test strategy at [lines 1398 and 1480](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1398).

- **Correct:** `interval_ms = 0` disables only timer ticks while other thresholds remain event-driven at [lines 908-910](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:908), with tests and acceptance recorded at [lines 1396, 1440, and 1553](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1396).

No blocker found. No files were modified, and no executable tests were requested or available for this design-document review.

The generic policy at [line 895](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:895), integration-test strategy at [line 1437](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1437), and performance requirement at [line 1520](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1520) instead read as global LRU-first eviction. They also do not explicitly record tests for the rule that metadata, snapshots, and provisional batches do not contribute to `max_cached_entries` at [line 890](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:890).

- **Medium:** The two metadata acceptance tokens are correctly specified as independent conjunctive checks at [lines 835-837](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:835), but the recorded tests do not independently prove `source_root_revision`. Snapshot publication increments `metadata_generation` as well, so the stale-publication cases at [line 1397](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1397) and [line 1439](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1439) would still pass if the source-revision check were absent. The strategy needs a current-generation/stale-source-revision case, paired with a stale-generation/current-source-revision case. Acceptance criterion 10 at [line 1552](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1552) currently mentions only stale generations.

- **Correct:** The visual/raw-buffer example and explicit absence of `/NNN` and `../` are closed at [lines 356-370](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:356), with integration coverage recorded at [line 1438](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1438).

- **Correct:** Dirty-View metadata sorting is deferred without changing real lines, `changedtick`, or undo state at [line 395](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:395), reinforced at [line 930](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:930), with test strategy at [lines 1398 and 1480](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1398).

- **Correct:** `interval_ms = 0` disables only timer ticks while other thresholds remain event-driven at [lines 908-910](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:908), with tests and acceptance recorded at [lines 1396, 1440, and 1553](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:1396).

content.text: 最终复审没有 blocker，还剩三处文字级矛盾：早期快照章节把可清理对象写窄了；淘汰策略应明确“对象类别优先、类别内 LRU”，不能描述成全局 LRU；metadata 的 generation 与 source revision 需要分别测试。现在做最后一轮定点修正。

edits.oldText: Cleanup policy may evict only snapshots and metadata that are not referenced by the current RootSession, an attached View's edit base, pending intent or diagnostics, an active scan/apply task, or watcher coverage.
edits.newText: Cleanup may release only cache objects that are not protected by the current RootSession, an attached View's edit base, pending intent or diagnostics, an active scan/apply task, or watcher coverage. This protection rule applies uniformly to scan-cache rows, metadata records, provisional batches, and obsolete snapshots.

edits.oldText: 2. Policy cleanup is opportunistic. A bounded sweeper removes the least-recently-used eligible entries when they exceed the configured idle age, memory estimate, or entry count. Old snapshots are eligible only when no attached View or RootSession state references them.
edits.newText: 2. Policy cleanup is opportunistic. A bounded sweeper follows the object-class priority defined below and removes least-recently-used eligible objects within each class when they exceed the configured idle age, memory estimate, or entry count. Old snapshots are eligible only when no attached View or RootSession state references them.

edits.oldText:
- cleanup age, memory, and entry-count thresholds, including independent `0` disables and `interval_ms = 0` with nonzero event-driven thresholds;
- metadata-generation cancellation and stale MetadataBatch rejection after column, sort, path, and namespace-revision changes;
- Cleanup is bounded and runs outside the Neovim rendering critical path; memory/count pressure evicts eligible least-recently-used state first.
edits.newText: - Cleanup is bounded and runs outside the Neovim rendering critical path; memory/count pressure follows the documented object-class priority and uses least-recently-used ordering within each class.

edits.oldText: 10. Column requirements are fetched as the union of attached View requirements; stale metadata generations are rejected, metadata-only changes never create namespace conflicts or deletion intent, and metadata sorting cannot reorder a dirty View's real lines.
edits.newText: 10. Column requirements are fetched as the union of attached View requirements; a MetadataBatch with either a stale metadata generation or a mismatched source root revision is rejected independently, metadata-only changes never create namespace conflicts or deletion intent, and metadata sorting cannot reorder a dirty View's real lines.

...
  700 Provisional batches and individual scopes may render as they arrive, but a generation publishes exactly one new immutable `current_snapshot` only after every requested scope reaches a terminal complete, partial, or failed result. Partial and failed scopes remain explicitly non-authoritative inside that single published result. Late or cancelled generations cannot publish, and provisional data never updates a View's edit base.
  701 
  702 Published snapshots remain alive while referenced by dirty Views and are released when no View needs them. Namespace snapshots contain identity, path, kind, coverage authority, and scan status; optional permission, size, and timestamp observations live in a separate RootSession metadata cache with its own monotonically increasing `metadata_revision`. Metadata enrichment or eviction may re-render columns without advancing `root_revision` or any View edit base.

A directory cache entry with no coverage reference, watcher, active task, pinned diagnostic, pending intent, or snapshot reference may be dropped immediately.

Old snapshots are eligible only when no attached View or RootSession state references them.

content.text:
已更新 [2026-07-15-fred-design.md](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:326)。

主要变化：

- 新增 Oil 风格的 `icon`、`permissions`、`size`、`mtime`、`ctime`、`atime`、`birthtime`、`type` 列。
- 展示效果接近你给出的示例，但不显示 `/003` 内部 ID，也不生成 `../` 行：

```text
  rwxr-xr-x       384  2026-07-16 10:22  .git/
  rw-r--r--     81.5k  2026-07-16 10:22  2026-07-15-fred-design.md
```

实际 buffer 文本仍然只有：

```text
.git/
2026-07-15-fred-design.md
```

列通过 extmark virtual text 显示，不参与路径解析、undo、changedtick 或 filesystem intent。版本一的权限列只读，不产生 `chmod`。

列模型参考了 Oil 的 [`columns.lua`](https://github.com/stevearc/oil.nvim/blob/b73018b75affd13fa38e2fc94ef753b465f770d7/lua/oil/columns.lua)、按需 stat 获取和全局列宽对齐，但不引入 Oil 运行时依赖。

清理策略位于 [Cache Cleanup Policy](/Users/bingcoke/project/lua/fred.nvim/2026-07-15-fred-design.md:886)：

```lua
cleanup = {
  interval_ms = 30000,
  max_idle_ms = 300000,
  max_memory_bytes = 268435456,
  max_cached_entries = 0,
}
```

每个配置独立生效，值为 `0` 时仅禁用对应条件。`interval_ms = 0` 只关闭定时扫描，非零的时间、内存和条目限制仍会在缓存写入、扫描完成、View 关闭等事件点执行。dirty View、当前 Snapshot、活跃任务、watcher coverage 和 pending intent 均不可被强制回收。

同步补充了 metadata generation、防止过期结果写回、dirty View 排序延迟、模块职责、测试策略和验收标准。两轮独立审查提出的边界问题均已采纳修正，没有遗留 blocker。

验证：`git diff --check` 通过，验收标准编号连续。仓库目前只有设计文档，没有可运行的实现测试。

---
name: grilling
description: Grill the user relentlessly about a plan, decision, or idea. Use when the user wants to stress-test their thinking, or uses any 'grill' trigger phrases.
---

Interview me relentlessly about every aspect of this until we reach a shared understanding. Walk down each branch of the decision tree, resolving dependencies between decisions one-by-one. For each question, provide your recommended answer.

Ask the questions one at a time, waiting for feedback on each question before continuing. Asking multiple questions at once is bewildering.

If a *fact* can be found by exploring the environment (filesystem, tools, etc.), look it up rather than asking me. The *decisions*, though, are mine — put each one to me and wait for my answer.

Do not act on it until I confirm we have reached a shared understanding. 


keymap使用类似 telescope的方式 n,i,v 等模式配置, 然后提供actions让用户自定义配置, 不使用字符串, 这个语义不太好 

还有就是支持自己自定义实例, 并且设置实例的float/buffer/split等方式的展示, 类似toggle term插件那种方式,  就是说把一个Fred实例创建暴露出来, 可以用户自定义, UI使用现有的一些ui库做就可以了, 支持基于某个实例寻找当前文件展开, 就比如说 , 把完整的fred生命周期暴露出来


配置好filetype , 并且把一些数据放进filetype里面 这样方便 用户自己去做处理

content.text:
第一个需要先确定的是 **Fred 实例的身份模型**，因为 keymap、action、UI 展示、reveal 和生命周期 API 都依赖它。

**问题 1：一个 Fred 实例是否只管理一个可复用的 View？**

推荐答案：**是。**

```lua
local explorer = require("fred").new({
  root = "/project",
  display = {
    mode = "float",
  },
})

explorer:open()
explorer:toggle()
explorer:reveal("/project/src/init.lua")
explorer:refresh()
explorer:apply()
explorer:close()
explorer:destroy()
```

建议语义：

- `new()` 创建持久实例并分配稳定 `InstanceId`。
- 一个实例同时最多拥有一个 Fred buffer/View。
- `close()` 关闭展示，但保留实例配置，之后可以再次 `open()`。
- `destroy()` 才彻底释放实例、View、buffer 和引用。
- 多个实例可以指向同一 root，并继续共享底层 `RootSession`。
- float、split、普通 buffer 只是同一实例的不同展示策略，不创建不同类型的实例。
- `reveal()` 总是作用于该实例，而不是猜测当前存在的任意 Fred buffer。

另一个选择是让实例管理多个 View，但这会让 `toggle()`、`reveal()`、buffer-local actions 和当前窗口归属变得含糊，我不建议。

你是否确认采用“**一个实例对应一个可复用 View，多个实例共享 RootSession**”这个模型？
是的, 并且注意的是, 比如我们按下回车 进入的是新的实例还是说这是老实例的变更?

content.text:
按回车进入目录时，推荐定义为：**当前实例的导航状态发生变化，不创建新实例。**

具体语义：

- `InstanceId` 不变。
- Fred buffer 和展示窗口尽量复用。
- 当前实例的 `current_root` 变为目标目录。
- 旧 View generation 失效，并从旧 `RootSession` 解除引用。
- 实例连接到新 root 对应的 `RootSession`。
- 实例配置、keymaps、actions、float/split 布局保持不变。
- 导航历史记录进入前的 root，供 `parent`、`back`、`forward` 使用。
- dirty 状态下先执行配置好的 apply/discard/cancel 流程，不能静默切换。
- 对文件按回车只用普通 Neovim 方式打开文件，不创建 Fred 实例。

只有显式 action 才创建新实例，例如：

```lua
actions.open_new_instance
actions.open_new_float
actions.open_new_split
```

这比“每进入一个目录就创建实例”更合理，否则连续导航会留下大量实例、buffer、watcher 和缓存引用。

**问题 2：是否确认目录 `<CR>` 默认执行当前实例的 `navigate()`，只有显式 `open_new_instance` action 才创建新 Fred 实例？**

推荐答案：**确认。**
提供用户自己配置, 默认是新实例, 每次new的时候都是把setup的opt合并放进去,mode表示默认的mode ,open的时候可以自己传入mode
提供keymap的action用户自己选择

content.text:
已确认这些决策：

- `<CR>` 不固定语义，由用户直接选择 action。
- 默认 `<CR>` 使用 `actions.open_new_instance`。
- 同时提供 `actions.navigate`，用户可配置为在原实例中切换 root。
- `new(opts)` 每次都以当前 `setup(opts)` 为基础做深合并，实例拿到独立的最终配置快照。
- `open()` 可以临时覆盖实例默认的展示方式，但不修改实例配置。
- keymap 直接接收 action 函数，不接受 `"actions.xxx"` 字符串。

示意：

```lua
local fred = require("fred")
local actions = fred.actions

fred.setup({
  keymaps = {
    n = {
      ["<CR>"] = actions.open_new_instance,
      ["-"] = actions.parent,
    },
    i = {},
    v = {},
  },
})

local explorer = fred.new({
  mode = "float",
})

explorer:open()
explorer:open({ mode = "split" })
```

**问题 3：展示方式的配置名是否仍叫 `mode`？**

这里会和 keymap 的 Neovim mode（`n`、`i`、`v`）形成两个不同含义的 `mode`。

我的推荐答案：**展示方式改叫 `layout`，只把 `mode` 用于 keymap。**

```lua
fred.setup({
  layout = "buffer",
  keymaps = {
    n = {},
    i = {},
    v = {},
  },
})

local explorer = fred.new({
  layout = "float",
})

explorer:open()
explorer:open({ layout = "split" })
```

可选值：

```text
buffer
float
split
vsplit
tab
```

这样 API 中不会同时出现“展示 mode”和“编辑器 mode”两个概念。你确认使用 `layout`，还是坚持展示配置叫 `mode`？
然后每一个实例和对应的buffer 基于自己传入的config做 清理机制

content.text:
确认：这是两套彼此独立的清理机制，不合并实例配置。

```lua
cleanup = {
  instance = {
    hidden_buffer_ms = 300000,
    idle_ms = 600000,
  },
  shared = {
    max_idle_ms = 300000,
    max_memory_bytes = 268435456,
    max_cached_entries = 0,
  },
}
```

语义建议：

- `cleanup.instance` 来自每次 `new(opts)` 合并后的实例配置。
- 每个实例独立计算空闲时间，管理自己的 window、buffer、View、UI 和定时器。
- `cleanup.shared` 管理 RootSession、snapshot、metadata cache 和 watcher。
- 共享对象首先由引用关系保护。
- 仍被任意实例、dirty edit base、任务或 watcher coverage 引用的数据不可清理。
- 引用归零后，才允许根据共享清理条件回收。
- 不对多个实例的 cleanup 配置做最小值、最大值或优先级合并。
- 所有数值仍保持 `0` 表示禁用对应条件。

**问题 5：实例清理触发后，应该清理到哪个生命周期层级？**

推荐答案：**自动清理只卸载实例的 buffer/View/UI，但保留实例对象及最终配置；彻底销毁只能显式调用 `destroy()`。**

```lua
local explorer = fred.new(opts)

explorer:open()
explorer:close()

-- 达到 instance cleanup 条件：
-- window、buffer、View、RootSession 引用被释放
-- explorer 实例及配置仍存在

explorer:open() -- 重新创建 View 和 buffer

explorer:destroy() -- 实例永久进入 Destroyed 状态
```

不建议空闲超时直接销毁实例，因为用户可能仍持有 Lua handle；此时后续调用突然报“实例不存在”会很难预测。

是否确认“**自动清理只休眠实例，`destroy()` 才永久销毁**”这一语义？
hidden_buffer_ms = 300000, 这是什么意思?

content.text:
`hidden_buffer_ms = 300000` 是我刚才提出的候选参数，表示：

> Fred buffer 不再显示在任何 Neovim window 中，并持续隐藏 300000 毫秒，也就是 5 分钟后，自动卸载该实例的 buffer、View 和 UI 资源。

它不表示窗口失去焦点。只有 buffer 完全不被任何 window 展示时才开始计时。

建议触发条件全部满足：

- buffer 没
这和idle有什么区别呢 高这么复杂

content.text:
`hidden_buffer_ms = 300000` 原本表示：实例的 buffer 不再被任何窗口显示后，等待 5 分钟再卸载 buffer/View。

`idle_ms` 表示没有任何用户操作的时间，即使窗口还显示着也可能算 idle。这个定义容易误清理正在查看的实例，确实没有必要。

建议删除 `idle_ms`，实例清理只保留一个参数：

```lua
cleanup = {
  instance = {
    delay_ms = 300000,
  },
}
```

语义：

- 实例仍在任意窗口显示：不启动计时。
- `close()` 或最后一个关联窗口关闭：启动计时。
- 再次 `open()`：取消计时。
- buffer 已修改、存在 pending intent 或正在 apply：暂停清理。
- 到期后释放 buffer、View、extmark、UI 和 RootSession 引用。
- 实例对象及其最终配置仍然保留，可以再次 `open()`。
- `delay_ms = 0`：禁用实例自动清理。
- `destroy()`：立即永久销毁实例，不受 `delay_ms` 影响。

**问题 5：是否确认实例清理只使用一个 `cleanup.instance.delay_ms`，不再区分 hidden 和 idle？**

推荐答案：**确认。**
对的, 就是说delay_ms 就自动自己调用destroy() , 但是有一个问题, 它可能存在于多个buffer中吗, 就是一个实例处理多个buffer
还是说只有一个buffer,但是存在于多个window中

content.text:
推荐：**一个实例只拥有一个 Fred buffer，但这个 buffer 可以同时显示在多个 window 中。**

```text
FredInstance
  InstanceId
  config
  buffer: 0..1
  view: 0..1
  windows: 0..N
```

例如：

```lua
local explorer = fred.new(opts)

explorer:open({ layout = "float" })  -- window A
explorer:open({ layout = "vsplit" }) -- window B
```

两个窗口显示同一个 buffer，因此共享：

- 文件路径内容；
- EntryId/extmark；
- dirty state；
- undo/redo；
- pending intent；
-当前 RootSession 和扫描结果。

窗口自己保留 window-local 状态，例如 cursor、尺寸和布局参数。

不建议一个实例管理多个 buffer，因为这相当于一个实例内存在多个 View、多个 changedtick、多个 undo history 和多组未提交 intent。此时 `apply()`、`reveal()`、清理计时和 action context 都会产生歧义。需要多个独立 buffer 时，应该创建多个实例。

同时记录你刚确认的修改：`cleanup.instance.delay_ms` 到期后会真正自动调用 `destroy()`，不是进入休眠状态。只要还有任意 window 显示该实例的 buffer，就不会启动销毁计时。

**问题 6：是否确认采用“一个实例一个 buffer、零到多个 window；多个 buffer 必须使用多个实例”的模型？**

推荐答案：**确认。**
ok
opt再加一个 on_attach 参数, 然后 自己new实例的时候也可以加, 如果两个都存在, 合并为list 不知道vim.merge怎么操作,

content.text: 我先确认当前 Neovim 的 `vim.tbl_deep_extend()` 对 list 的实际行为；这里不能假设它会自动追加，因为 Lua 数组通常会按数字键覆盖或递归合并。确认后我给出一个明确的 `on_attach` 配置形状，再只问一个合并语义问题。

arguments.command: nvim --headless -u NONE "+lua local a=function() end; local b=function() end; local c=function() end; local x=vim.tbl_deep_extend('force',{on_attach={a,b}},{on_attach={c}}); print(vim.inspect(x.on_attach)); print(#x.on_attach, x.on_attach[1]==c, x.on_attach[2]==b)" +qa

content.text:
{ <function 1> }
1 true false

content.text:
确认，公开配置同时接受函数或 list，内部统一转成 list。执行顺序固定为 `setup.on_attach` 在前，`new.on_attach` 在后。

```lua
fred.setup({
  on_attach = global_attach,
})

local explorer = fred.new({
  on_attach = {
    instance_attach_1,
    instance_attach_2,
  },
})
```

最终实例内部保存：

```lua
resolved.on_attach = {
  global_attach,
  instance_attach_1,
  instance_attach_2,
}
```

**问题 8：`on_attach` 应该在什么时候执行，以及接收什么参数？**

推荐答案：**每次实例创建自己的 buffer 时执行一次，接收一个上下文对象；同一 buffer 打开到其他 window 时不重复执行。**

```lua
on_attach = function(ctx)
  local instance = ctx.instance
  local bufnr = ctx.bufnr
  local actions = ctx.actions
  local config = ctx.config

  vim.keymap.set("n", "<CR>", actions.open_new_instance, {
    buffer = bufnr,
  })
end
```

推荐上下文：

```lua
ctx = {
  instance = instance,
  instance_id = instance:id(),
  bufnr = bufnr,
  actions = require("fred").actions,
  config = resolved_instance_config,
}
```

理由：

- 一个实例只有一个 buffer，所以 attach 应与 buffer 生命周期绑定。
- 同一个 buffer 出现在多个 window 中时，不应重复注册 buffer-local keymap/autocmd。
- float/split 等每次展示行为应由单独的 `on_open` 或 layout hook 处理，而不是复用 `on_attach`。
- context table 后续增加字段不会破坏回调参数顺序。

是否确认采用“**每个 buffer 创建时执行一次 `on_attach(ctx)`，多 window 不重复执行**”这一语义？
ok

content.text:
**问题 9：`delay_ms` 到期时，如果实例 buffer 仍有未提交修改或正在执行任务，自动 `destroy()` 应该怎么处理？**

推荐答案：**自动清理只能销毁 clean 且 idle 的实例，绝不能静默丢弃修改。**

具体规则：

- 仍有 window 显示：不启动计时。
- buffer clean，且没有 scan/apply/preview：到期调用 `destroy()`。
- buffer modified 或存在 pending intent：暂停自动销毁，保留实例和 buffer。
- 正在 scan/apply/preview：等待任务结束后重新判断。
- 用户重新打开实例：取消当前计时。
- 普通 `destroy()` 遇到 dirty 状态时返回错误。
- 只有显式 `destroy({ force = true })` 才允许放弃未提交状态并销毁。
- 自动清理永远不使用 `force = true`。

这样不会因为隐藏一个 Fred window，几分钟后就静默丢失尚未 apply 的文件操作。

是否确认采用“**自动销毁只处理 clean 实例，dirty 实例必须保留，强制丢弃只能由用户显式调用**”的规则？
如果实例 buffer 仍有未提交修改或正在执行任务 这是不可能发生的事情,

content.text:
如果把它定义为系统不变量，可以成立，但需要明确哪些路径保证这个不变量。

例如以下操作都可能让最后一个 Fred window 消失：

- `actions.open_new_instance`
- 打开普通文件
- `toggle()` / `close()`
- 切换当前 buffer
- `:q`、`:close`、`:bdelete`
- 外部 Lua 调用 `nvim_win_close()` 或 `nvim_buf_delete()`

因此建议写成：

> 任何由 Fred 控制、且会使实例可见 window 数量变为零的操作，必须先完成 dirty-state resolution；存在活动任务时不得进入 cleanup countdown。

处理流程：

```text
clean
  -> 允许隐藏
  -> 启动 delay_ms
  -> 到期 destroy

dirty
  -> apply / discard / cancel
  -> apply 或 discard 后才允许隐藏
  -> cancel 保持当前 window

active task
  -> 不允许隐藏最后一个 window
  -> 等待任务完成后重新执行原 action
```

用户显式执行 `:q!`、`nvim_buf_delete(..., { force = true })` 之类强制操作时，Fred 无法保证状态仍然存在，应当视为用户主动强制销毁。

**问题 9：这个“不可能发生”的保证范围是什么？**

推荐答案：**Fred 自己的 actions 和实例 API 必须严格保证；Neovim 外部的强制关闭视为显式强制销毁，不尝试拦截或恢复。**

是否确认这个边界？
就是用户只可能同时操作一个buffer呀

content.thinking: **Clarifying buffer focus versus lifetime handling**

content.text: 就是说如果用户在操作, 就不可能触发delay, 因为这个时候表示用户正在使用这个实例

content.text:
明白了。这里不需要判断 dirty、输入时间或任务状态，`delay_ms` 也不是“用户空闲时间”。

实例是否正在使用，只看它的 buffer 是否还显示在窗口中：

```text
visible_window_count > 0
  -> 实例正在使用
  -> 不启动 delay

visible_window_count == 0
  -> 实例已不再使用
  -> 启动 delay_ms

计时期间重新显示
  -> 取消 delay

计时到期仍没有窗口显示
  -> 自动 destroy()
```

即使同一个 buffer 同时显示在多个 window：

```text
window A ─┐
          ├─ 同一个 instance buffer
window B ─┘
```

只要其中任意一个 window 仍在显示，实例就不会开始清理。直到最后一个 window 不再显示该 buffer，才触发倒计时。

这不是传统意义上的 idle timeout，更准确的配置名可以是：

```lua
cleanup = {
  delay_ms = 300000,
}
```

**问题 10：是否确认实例的“使用中”只由 `visible_window_count` 判断，完全不记录键盘活动时间或普通 idle 时间？**

推荐答案：**确认。**
ok

content.text:
**问题 11：`actions.open_new_instance` 从当前实例创建子实例时，新实例是否继承当前实例的覆盖配置？**

已确认所有 `new(opts)` 都先使用 `setup()` 配置，再合并本次传入的 `opts`：

```text
resolved_config = merge(setup_config, new_opts)
```

推荐答案：**新实例不隐式继承来源实例的 resolved config，只使用 `setup_config + new_opts`。**

例如：

```lua
fred.setup({
  layout = "buffer",
  columns = { "icon" },
})

local parent = fred.new({
  columns = { "icon", "size" },
})
```

在 `parent` 中执行默认的 `actions.open_new_instance`，新实例应使用：

```lua
{
  layout = "buffer",
  columns = { "icon" },
}
```

而不是隐式继承：

```lua
{
  columns = { "icon", "size" },
}
```

如果用户希望复制当前实例配置，应提供明确 action：

```lua
actions.clone_instance
```

或者自行配置：

```lua
["<CR>"] = function(ctx)
  local child = fred.new({
    columns = ctx.instance.config.columns,
  })

  child:open({
    root = ctx.entry.path,
  })
end
```

这样 `new()` 的行为始终可预测，不会因为它是由哪个实例创建而产生隐藏继承。

是否确认“**新实例只合并 setup 配置和本次 new opts，不隐式继承来源实例配置**”？
默认继承option, 不然用户体验割裂, 还有就是root是在open确定的吗, 还是new确定的比较好

content.text:
确认修正：通过当前实例执行 `open_new_instance` 时，子实例默认继承来源实例的 resolved options，再应用本次 action 的覆盖配置，避免 columns、keymaps、layout、cleanup 和 `on_attach` 突然恢复成全局默认。

```text
child_config =
  clone(parent.resolved_config)
  + action/new overrides
```

直接调用 `fred.new(opts)`、没有来源实例时，仍然是：

```text
instance_config =
  setup_config
  + new opts
```

继承 `on_attach` 时不重新追加一次 `setup.on_attach`，否则全局 callback 会重复执行。

---

关于 `root`，我的推荐是：**在 `new()` 时确定，`open()` 只负责如何展示。**

```lua
local explorer = fred.new({
  root = "/project",
  layout = "float",
})

explorer:open()
explorer:open({ layout = "vsplit" })
explorer:reveal("/project/src/init.lua")
```

原因：

- root 是实例的核心身份，不只是 UI 参数。
- `reveal()`、`refresh()`、`apply()` 在首次 `open()` 前也能知道作用范围。
- 实例配置、RootSession 连接和路径校验更明确。
- `open()` 不会同时承担“改变数据源”和“改变展示方式”两种职责。
- 进入目录并创建新实例时逻辑直接：

```lua
local child = parent:new({
  root = selected_directory,
})

child:open()
```

如果省略 root，则 `new()` 当场解析当前工作目录：

```lua
local explorer = fred.new() -- root = 当前 cwd
```

需要改变同一实例 root 时，使用明确方法：

```lua
explorer:set_root(path)
explorer:navigate(path)
```

而不是让 `open({ root = path })` 隐式改变实例身份。

**问题 12：是否确认 `root` 在 `new()` 时确定，`open()` 只接收 layout/window 展示参数，不接受 root？**

推荐答案：**确认。**
ok

content.text:
**问题 14：内置 action 和用户自定义 action 接收什么上下文？**

推荐所有 action 统一使用：

```lua
action(ctx, opts?)
```

直接配置内置 action：

```lua
keymaps = {
  n = {
    ["<CR>"] = actions.open_new_instance,
  },
}
```

需要附加参数时用普通函数包装：

```lua
keymaps = {
  n = {
    ["<C-v>"] = function(ctx)
      return actions.open_new_instance(ctx, {
        layout = "vsplit",
      })
    end,
  },
}
```

推荐 `ctx` 内容：

```lua
ctx = {
  instance = instance,
  instance_id = instance:id(),

  bufnr = bufnr,
  winid = winid,
  mode = "n",

  entry = entry_under_cursor,
  selection = selected_entries,

  root = instance:root(),
  cursor = {
    line = line,
    column = column,
  },

  actions = require("fred").actions,
  config = instance:config(),
}
```

语义：

- `ctx` 在触发 action 时创建，是当次调用的只读快照。
- `entry` 在光标不对应有效条目时为 `nil`。
- `selection` 没有 visual selection 时为空 list，不使用 `nil`。
- `instance` 是完整公开实例对象，可调用 `open()`、`reveal()`、`refresh()`、`apply()`、`destroy()` 等。
- `config` 是实例 resolved config 的只读副本，用户修改它不改变实例配置。
- action 不依赖全局“当前 Fred buffer”猜测实例。
- 同一个 action 可由 keymap、`on_attach`、命令或用户 Lua 直接调用。

是否确认统一采用“**`action(ctx, opts?)`，上下文显式携带 instance/buffer/window/entry/selection**”的接口？
ok
记得在buffer中 就是忘记了 类似vim.b 之类的 放数据, 这样用户也可以自己做配置,

content.text: 我先确认当前 Neovim 的 `vim.b` 能存哪些 Lua 类型。这里很关键：如果直接把 instance、actions 或包含 callback 的完整 config 塞进 `vim.b`，可能因为函数/userdata 无法转换为 buffer variable 而失败。确认后我会给出一个稳定的 namespaced 数据结构。

arguments.command: nvim --headless -u NONE "+lua local ok1,e1=pcall(function() vim.b.fred_plain={instance_id='x',root='/tmp'} end); local ok2,e2=pcall(function() vim.b.fred_fn={cb=function() end} end); print('plain',ok1,vim.inspect(vim.b.fred_plain)); print('function',ok2,e2)" +qa

content.text:
你说的是 **buffer-local variables**：

```lua
vim.b
vim.b[bufnr]
```

底层 API 是：

```lua
vim.api.nvim_buf_set_var(bufnr, name, value)
vim.api.nvim_buf_get_var(bufnr, name)
```

建议 Fred 使用一个统一命名空间：

```lua
vim.b[bufnr].fred = {
  instance_id = "...",
  view_id = "...",
  root = "/project",
  layout = "float",
  state = "open",
  root_revision = 12,
  metadata_revision = 4,
}
```

不要直接把 instance 对象放进去。实测 `vim.b` 读取 table 时会生成新 table，并丢失 metatable，所以实例方法不能可靠保留。用户应通过 ID 获取真实实例：

```lua
local data = vim.b[bufnr].fred
local instance = require("fred").get_instance(data.instance_id)
```

同时提供快捷 API：

```lua
local instance = require("fred").get_instance_by_buf(bufnr)
```

推荐初始化顺序：

```text
1. 创建 Fred buffer
2. 写入 vim.b[bufnr].fred
3. 设置 filetype=fred
4. 触发用户的 FileType fred autocmd
5. 安装实例 keymaps
6. 调用 on_attach callbacks
```

这样用户可以直接通过 filetype 自定义：

```lua
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("FileType", {
  pattern = "fred",
  callback = function(event)
    local data = vim.b[event.buf].fred
    local instance = require("fred").get_instance(data.instance_id)

    vim.keymap.set("n", "gx", function()
      instance:reveal_current_file()
    end, {
      buffer = event.buf,
    })
  end,
})
```

**问题 15：是否确认使用 `vim.b[bufnr].fred` 存放稳定、可序列化的实例元数据，并通过 `get_instance()` / `get_instance_by_buf()` 获取真实实例？**

推荐答案：**确认。**
ok

content.text:
**问题 16：Fred 实例的 `filetype` 是固定为 `fred`，还是允许每个实例自定义？**

推荐答案：**filetype 固定为 `fred`，实例差异放进 `vim.b[bufnr].fred`，不要通过不同 filetype 表达。**

```lua
local explorer = fred.new({
  name = "project_explorer",
  profile = "project",
})
```

对应 buffer：

```lua
vim.bo[bufnr].filetype = "fred"

vim.b[bufnr].fred = {
  instance_id = "...",
  name = "project_explorer",
  profile = "project",
  root = "/project",
  layout = "float",
}
```

用户可以在统一的 `FileType fred` 中区分实例：

```lua
vim.api.nvim_create_autocmd("FileType", {
  pattern = "fred",
  callback = function(event)
    local data = vim.b[event.buf].fred

    if data.profile == "project" then
      -- project explorer 配置
    elseif data.profile == "git" then
      -- 其他实例配置
    end
  end,
})
```

固定 filetype 的好处：

- `ftplugin/fred.lua`、syntax、highlight 和 autocmd 只需要维护一套。
- 自定义实例不会意外失去 Fred 的 buffer 配置。
- `profile`/`name` 比制造 `fred_project`、`fred_git` 等 filetype 更适合表达实例用途。
- 用户仍可通过 `on_attach` 和 `vim.b.fred` 完整自定义。

是否确认采用“**filetype 固定为 `fred`，实例类型通过 `name`/`profile` buffer metadata 区分**”？
ok

content.text:
**问题 17：之前尚未确认的展示参数名称，最终使用 `mode` 还是 `layout`？**

现在 keymap 已经使用 Neovim mode：

```lua
keymaps = {
  n = {},
  i = {},
  v = {},
}
```

因此推荐把窗口展示方式命名为 `layout`：

```lua
local explorer = fred.new({
  layout = "float",
})

explorer:open()
explorer:open({
  layout = "vsplit",
})
```

推荐内置值：

```text
buffer
float
split
vsplit
tab
```

语义：

- `new({ layout = ... })` 设置实例默认布局。
- `open({ layout = ... })` 只覆盖本次打开方式。
- 本次覆盖不修改实例默认配置。
- keymap 中的 `mode` 永远只表示 `n`、`i`、`v` 等 Neovim 模式。
- 自定义布局后续可以通过 layout provider 扩展。

是否确认展示参数使用 **`layout`**，不再使用容易与 keymap 混淆的 `mode`？
ok

content.text:
**问题 18：Fred 的窗口/UI 是否强制依赖某个 UI 库？**

推荐答案：**核心不强制依赖 UI 库，提供内置 layout；用户可以用现有 UI 库实现自定义 layout provider。**

内置布局：

```lua
layout = "buffer"
layout = "float"
layout = "split"
layout = "vsplit"
layout = "tab"
```

自定义布局可以直接传函数：

```lua
local explorer = fred.new({
  layout = function(ctx)
    -- 用户可以在这里使用 nui.nvim、snacks.nvim 或其他 UI 库
    local popup = create_custom_popup(ctx.bufnr)

    return {
      winids = { popup.winid },
      close = function()
        popup:unmount()
      end,
      focus = function()
        vim.api.nvim_set_current_win(popup.winid)
      end,
    }
  end,
})
```

推荐 layout provider 只负责展示：

```lua
ctx = {
  instance = instance,
  bufnr = bufnr,
  config = resolved_config,
  previous_winid = vim.api.nvim_get_current_win(),
}
```

它不能创建另一个 Fred buffer，也不拥有 View、RootSession 或实例生命周期。它只接收实例已有的 buffer，并返回 window handle 和清理函数。

好处：

- Fred 不被锁定到 `nui.nvim`、`snacks.nvim` 等单一依赖。
- 默认安装无需额外插件即可使用。
- 用户仍然可以完全使用现有 UI 库控制 border、title、尺寸、位置和动画。
- 自定义 UI 销毁时，Fred 可以通过统一的 `close()` handle 更新 `visible_window_count`。

是否确认采用“**内置 layout 无外部依赖，同时允许函数形式的自定义 layout provider**”？

urls.title: Is maintenance of this repo still intended?
urls.content: If not, it should probably be forked to an organization. I'm using my own fork with a fix for months now. `nui` is still widely used, but currently stale, with issues and PR's open.
